name: proc_creation_win_expand_cabinet_files
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*\\expand.exe" and process.command_line like~ ("*-F:*", "*/F:*", "*–F:*", "*—F:*", "*―F:*")) and ((process.command_line like~ ("*:\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\ProgramData*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*\\Admin$\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*", "*\\C$\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*")) or ((process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Contacts\\*"))) and (not (process.parent.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Dell\\UpdateService\\ServiceShell.exe" and process.command_line:"*C:\\ProgramData\\Dell\\UpdateService\\Temp\\*"))
